title: HEIC & DXF Formats
excerpt: Add file support to view these formats in Monday

posts.author: abrant (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: Add file support to view these formats in Monday

posts.author: syplex (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t believe this isn’t a feature. So iPhone photos don’t show up properly in the Files column?

posts.author: TrueLinksupport (Janinne)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! This is a needed feature - otherwise you have to download to computer to view the file.

posts.author: TrueLinksupport (Janinne)
posts.cookedHtml:
OR if this feature can’t be added - please limit what types of files that can be uploaded to only Monday supported file types.
Why accept a HEIC upload if you can’t view it?

posts.author: jacediem (Jace)
posts.cookedHtml: agreed - particularly for social content that is taken with an iphone and then stored in the “content planning” - not being able to see the content takes the wind out of the sails for using Monday.com for social media content planning…

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml: This is true- don’t accept files that be viewed. We have many individuals outside our organization submitting files for review.
